title: Create Development plan
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

First pass for the Buildah development plan.  Also removed links from the Demos page that best live on the main page.

comments.body: Weird ubuntu error with Golang 1.9.  Going to kick the bot again.
@pixdrift pointed out in IRC that we still listed 'alpha' in the README.md.  I've remove that line from the README.md and it's the only change with the latest push.

:pushpin: Commit 0f91f4c has been approved by `rhatdan`
